name: DefaultCapo Script
activities: Validates charter data integrity
Gates DelegatedData spending via spend delegate requirement
Enforces governance authority for lifecycle operations
Provides escape-hatch delegate replacement
Retires reference scripts

name: CapoMinter Script
activities: Bootstraps charter with initial UUTs from seed
Defers day-to-day minting to mint delegate
Provides escape-hatch mint delegate replacement
Creates new spend delegates

name: BasicDelegate Script
activities: Orchestrates CRUD operations on delegated data
Re-delegates to data-policy delegates via manifest lookup
Manages delegate lifecycle (create, replace, retire)
Handles capo lifecycle (queue/commit changes, manifest updates)
Supports batched MultipleDelegateActivities

name: CapoDelegateHelpers
activities: Defines RelativeDelegateLink for charter references
Defines IsDelegation datum for delegate authority
Provides delegate authority verification protocol
Defines DelegationDetail linking delegates to Capo
Defines activity enum types for delegation dispatch

name: CapoHelpers
activities: Defines CapoDatum enum (CharterData, DelegatedData, ScriptReference)
Provides manifest parsing and lookup
Provides CapoCtx fluent context builder
Defines abstract capoStoredData envelope with type field

name: CapoMintHelpers
activities: Defines MinterActivity enum
Provides seed-based UUT generation utilities

name: StellarHeliosHelpers
activities: Provides on-chain logging (debug UPLC only)
Provides REQT assertions for requirements tracing
Provides value construction and checking helpers
Provides redeemer extraction utilities
Provides AnyData wrapper and CIP-68 extraction

name: TypeMapMetadata
activities: Defines TypeInfo and TypeMap for schema metadata

name: UnspecializedDelegate
activities: Provides delegate scaffold with placeholder activities
Defines validation hooks for application specialization
Defines datum enum matching BasicDelegate structure

name: Minting Chain
payload: mintWithDelegateAuthorizing triggers mint delegate; CreatingDelegatedData/DeletingDelegatedData triggers data-policy

name: Spending Chain
payload: spendingDelegatedDatum triggers spend delegate; UpdatingDelegatedData triggers data-policy

name: Data-Policy Re-delegation
payload: Data type name resolved via manifest; policy UUT spent to trigger validation; MintingActivity/SpendingActivity/BurningActivity redeemers

name: UUT Authority Pattern
description: Delegate authority proven by spending (not holding) unique token at delegate script address. IsDelegation datum links token back to Capo. Spending triggers script validation. Token must be returned to home address.

name: Manifest-Based Dispatch
description: Charter manifest maps data type names to DgDataPolicy entries. Delegates look up manifest at validation time to find correct data-policy. Enables upgrade by changing delegate link without affecting other scripts or data.

name: Abstract capoStoredData Envelope
description: Two-level datum: abstract (CapoDatum::DelegatedData in CapoHelpers) carries type field for dispatch routing without deserializing inner data. Concrete (specialized per DelegatedDataContract) deserializes inner type for enforcement. Enables abstract delegation dispatch.

name: Escape Hatch Mechanism
description: forcingNewMintDelegate and forcingNewSpendDelegate bypass normal upgrade process. Handled directly by CapoMinter+DefaultCapo without involving the potentially broken delegate. Requires govAuthority. Safety valve for delegate bugs.
